structured.title: Phone App Connectivity Issues Discussed
structured.overview: The user and someone referred to as Exactly discuss technical problems with a phone app that behaves differently on Wi‑Fi versus mobile data. The app has reduced functionality and fails to find locations like Hounslow when on Wi‑Fi, but works properly when off Wi‑Fi and using the internet directly. They suspect something odd with the phone or apps getting confused. The user mentions having shared a prior ChatGPT conversation and suggests continuing it with specific examples so it might provide guidance. Exactly acknowledges they will look into it later but focuses on the current task, and they both accept that some lag and technical issues cannot immediately be fixed, so the user must decide whether to keep using the laggy service or stop for now.

apps_results.content:
## Phone and app issues  
- App works partly; search function not working  
- Places like "Hounslow" not found on WiFi  
- Works normally when off WiFi using Internet  

## Attempts to troubleshoot  
- Unsure of cause; mentions "apps" and "phones" confusing  
- Suggestion to check Internet or ChatGPT for help  
- Plan to look into it later, not immediately  

## Frustration and limitations  
- Acknowledgement: problem is laggy, unresolved  
- Nothing more they can do technically right now  
- User must choose to continue using it or stop  

## Next steps  
- Later review ChatGPT conversation for advice  
- Investigate app/WiFi settings and Internet behavior
